name: Pico De Gallo No.3
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes and onions.
2. Chop the tomatillos, serrano peppers, and cilantro leaves.
3. In a bowl, mix together the diced tomatoes, chopped onions, chopped tomatillos, finely chopped serrano peppers, oil, white vinegar, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in the chopped cilantro leaves until well combined.
5. Let the mixture sit at room temperature for several hours or refrigerate it for up to 3 days before serving.
This recipe yields approximately 2 cups of pico de gallo. It is best served fresh on fajitas or as a relish, but can be kept in the refrigerator for several days.
